name: perform-long-line-wrap
note: CW-1 (P0): a long chord-over-lyric line HARD-CLIPS/requires horizontal scroll in the Perform (Stage) view at 412px because .lyrLine{white-space:pre} never wraps and the font-shrink auto-fit floors at 0.5x - the line can still be wider than the viewport at the floor. Reading the whole line mid-performance (both hands busy) must not require a scroll gesture, and the chord must stay directly over its lyric after wrapping. Red-first: seed a saved custom song with one genuinely long chorus line, open it, tap Stage - pre-fix, the seeded long line's .lyrLine scrollWidth exceeds its clientWidth (still overflowing even at the auto-fit floor).

steps.label: seed a saved custom song with one very long chorus line so the perform view has content that overflows at 412px
steps.js: (function(){try{localStorage.setItem('roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1', JSON.stringify([{id:'longLineSong', t:'Long Line Song', a:'Me', y:2026, d:'Mine', custom:true, forkOf:'k1', seq:['C','G','Am','F'], sheet:[['Verse','[C] a short intro line [G] here'],['Chorus','[C]Have you ever seen the [G]rain coming down on a [Am]sunny day watching it all [F]wash away every single one of my [C]dreams from yesterday and the [G]day before that too']]}]));return true}catch(e){return false}})()

steps.label: CW-1: no .lyrLine is horizontally clipped - every rendered chord-over-lyric row fits inside the stage viewport (row scrollWidth <= pSheet's own clientWidth, the real visible bound) instead of overflowing it (FAILS pre-fix on the seeded long chorus line)
CW-1: the long chorus line actually WRAPPED into multiple rows (not just already short enough) - more .lyrLine rows render than raw sheet lines with lyric content

CW-1 alignment: after wrapping, every chord character still sits in the SAME COLUMN as the lyric character directly below it (sampled per wrapped row via 1-char Range rects - the chord line sits one line above its lyric line, but column x-position must match exactly)
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;var checked=0;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var crd=lines[i].querySelector('.crd');if(!crd)return false;var crdNode=crd.firstChild;if(!crdNode||crdNode.nodeType!==3)continue;var lyricNode=null;for(var n=crd.nextSibling;n;n=n.nextSibling){if(n.nodeType===3){lyricNode=n;break;}}if(!lyricNode)return false;var lyricFull=lyricNode.textContent;var lyricStart=lyricFull.indexOf('\n')+1;var crdLen=crdNode.textContent.length;var lyricLen=lyricFull.length-lyricStart;var sampleLen=Math.min(crdLen,lyricLen);if(sampleLen<1)continue;var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(sampleLen/6));for(var c=0;c<sampleLen;c+=step){var r1=document.createRange();r1.setStart(crdNode,c);r1.setEnd(crdNode,c+1);var r2=document.createRange();r2.setStart(lyricNode,lyricStart+c);r2.setEnd(lyricNode,lyricStart+c+1);var b1=r1.getBoundingClientRect(),b2=r2.getBoundingClientRect();if(Math.abs(b1.left-b2.left)>2)return false;checked++;}}return checked>5;})()
